user_agents.name: OAI-SearchBot
user_agents.purpose: Surface websites in ChatGPT search results
user_agents.scope: Crawls sites to index content for ChatGPT search features. Publishes IP ranges.
user_agents.opt_out: Disallow OAI-SearchBot in robots.txt; opted-out sites will not appear in ChatGPT search answers

user_agents.name: OAI-AdsBot
user_agents.purpose: Validate safety of web pages submitted as ads on ChatGPT
user_agents.scope: Only visits pages submitted as ads. Data not used for training AI models.
user_agents.opt_out: Not mentioned as honoring robots.txt opt-outs

user_agents.name: GPTBot
user_agents.purpose: Crawl content for training generative AI foundation models
user_agents.scope: Automatic crawl of web content for training. Publishes IP ranges.
user_agents.opt_out: Disallow GPTBot in robots.txt indicates site should not be used in model training

user_agents.name: ChatGPT-User
user_agents.purpose: User-initiated requests in ChatGPT and Custom GPTs for live responses
user_agents.scope: Triggered by user actions asking ChatGPT to visit pages or use GPT Actions. Not automatic crawling.
user_agents.opt_out: robots.txt rules may not apply since triggered by users, not automatic crawl

user_agents.name: ClaudeBot
user_agents.purpose: Enhance utility and safety of generative AI models by collecting web content for training
user_agents.scope: Gathers web content from public web for model development and training datasets
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: ClaudeBot / Disallow: / in robots.txt file, or Crawl-delay: 1

user_agents.name: Claude-User
user_agents.purpose: Support Claude AI users by accessing websites when individuals ask questions to Claude
user_agents.scope: User-initiated requests for web content access when Claude users query the system
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: Claude-User / Disallow: / in robots.txt file to prevent retrieval of your content

user_agents.name: Claude-SearchBot
user_agents.purpose: Navigate the web to improve search result quality and enhance relevance and accuracy of search responses
user_agents.scope: Analyzes online content specifically for search optimization and user search results
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: Claude-SearchBot / Disallow: / in robots.txt file to prevent indexing for search

user_agents.name: Googlebot
user_agents.purpose: Building Google Search index, Discover, Google Images, Video, and News
user_agents.scope: Crawls general web content for search indexing across multiple products

user_agents.name: Googlebot-Image
user_agents.purpose: Crawling images for Google Images, Discover, Video, and search features
user_agents.scope: Crawls image URLs specifically for image-related search products

user_agents.name: Googlebot-Video
user_agents.purpose: Crawling videos for video-related Google Search features
user_agents.scope: Crawls video content for video search and related products

user_agents.name: Googlebot-News
user_agents.purpose: Crawling content for Google News product and news.google.com
user_agents.scope: Crawls news content using various Googlebot user agent strings

user_agents.name: Storebot-Google
user_agents.purpose: Crawling for Google Shopping and shopping-related search features
user_agents.scope: Crawls product information for Google Shopping surfaces

user_agents.name: Google-InspectionTool
user_agents.purpose: Testing for Rich Result Test and URL inspection in Google Search Console
user_agents.scope: Crawls for search testing and validation tools only

user_agents.name: GoogleOther
user_agents.purpose: Generic crawling for various Google product teams and internal R&D
user_agents.scope: Generic crawling for research, development, and product-specific needs

user_agents.name: GoogleOther-Image
user_agents.purpose: Fetching publicly accessible image URLs for various Google product teams
user_agents.scope: Image-specific version of GoogleOther for product team use

user_agents.name: GoogleOther-Video
user_agents.purpose: Fetching publicly accessible video URLs for various Google product teams
user_agents.scope: Video-specific version of GoogleOther for product team use

user_agents.name: Google-CloudVertexBot
user_agents.purpose: Crawling for building Vertex AI Agents as requested by site owners
user_agents.scope: Crawls content for Vertex AI Agent construction by site owner request

user_agents.name: Google-Extended
user_agents.purpose: Training Gemini models and providing grounding for Gemini Apps and Vertex AI
user_agents.scope: Controls whether crawled content may be used for Gemini model training and grounding

user_agents.name: PerplexityBot
user_agents.purpose: Surface and link websites in search results on Perplexity
user_agents.scope: Search result indexing; not used for AI foundation model training

user_agents.name: Perplexity-User
user_agents.purpose: Support user actions and fetch pages to answer user questions on Perplexity
user_agents.scope: User-triggered fetches for live responses; ignores robots.txt by default
user_agents.opt_out: Configure via WAF rules using User-Agent and IP address matching to block requests

user_agents.name: Applebot
user_agents.purpose: Power search features in Spotlight, Siri, and Safari
user_agents.scope: General web crawl for search indexing across Apple ecosystem
user_agents.opt_out: Disallow in robots.txt: User-agent: Applebot / Disallow: /

user_agents.name: Applebot-Extended
user_agents.purpose: Determine content usage for training Apple foundation models and generative AI
user_agents.scope: Does not crawl webpages; processes data already crawled by Applebot
user_agents.opt_out: Disallow in robots.txt: User-agent: Applebot-Extended / Disallow: /

user_agents.name: iTMS
user_agents.purpose: Crawl URLs associated with registered content on Apple Podcasts
user_agents.scope: Apple Podcasts-specific content; does not follow robots.txt
user_agents.opt_out: Not documented; iTMS does not respect robots.txt directives

user_agents.name: FacebookExternalHit
user_agents.purpose: Crawl content shared on Meta apps; display title, description, thumbnail image
user_agents.scope: Content from websites or apps shared on Facebook, Instagram, or Messenger
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: facebookexternalhit / Disallow: / in robots.txt (may bypass for security checks)

user_agents.name: Meta-WebIndexer
user_agents.purpose: Improve Meta AI search result quality and relevance for users
user_agents.scope: General web crawl to enhance Meta AI search accuracy and help cite content

user_agents.name: Meta-ExternalAds
user_agents.purpose: Crawl web for improving advertising and business-related products and services
user_agents.scope: General web crawl for advertising and business product improvement

user_agents.name: Meta-ExternalAgent
user_agents.purpose: Train foundation AI models and improve products by indexing content
user_agents.scope: General web crawl for AI model training and product development

user_agents.name: Meta-ExternalFetcher
user_agents.purpose: Fetch links at user request; support agentic AI capabilities and task completion
user_agents.scope: User-triggered individual link fetches for AI navigation and task assistance
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: meta-externalfetcher / Disallow: / in robots.txt (may bypass for user-requested fetches)

user_agents.name: GPTBot
user_agents.purpose: Training data collection for OpenAI models
user_agents.scope: General web crawl to gather training data
user_agents.opt_out: Disallow GPTBot in robots.txt or use X-Robots-Tag: noindex header

user_agents.name: CCBot
user_agents.purpose: Common Crawl archive collection
user_agents.scope: General web crawl for Internet Archive

user_agents.name: Amazonbot
user_agents.purpose: Improve products and services, train Amazon AI models
user_agents.scope: General web crawl for product improvement and AI model training

user_agents.name: Amzn-SearchBot
user_agents.purpose: Improve search experiences in Amazon products and services
user_agents.scope: Crawl for search eligibility in Alexa and Rufus; does not train generative AI

user_agents.name: Amzn-User
user_agents.purpose: Support user actions requiring up-to-date information
user_agents.scope: User-triggered fetches for live responses to Alexa queries; does not train generative AI

user_agents.name: CCBot/2.0
user_agents.purpose: Web crawling for Common Crawl dataset creation
user_agents.scope: General web crawl of Internet content for research and analysis
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: CCBot / Disallow: / in robots.txt file

user_agents.name: CCBot/1.0
user_agents.purpose: Web crawling for Common Crawl dataset creation (legacy version)
user_agents.scope: General web crawl of Internet content for research and analysis
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: CCBot / Disallow: / in robots.txt file

user_agents.name: Agentic crawlers (general)
user_agents.purpose: AI-driven automated tools and agents accessing web content for various purposes
user_agents.scope: General web crawl across Cloudflare network; now representing ~10% of total requests
user_agents.opt_out: Via Cloudflare Agent Readiness controls and redirects for AI training verification; robots.txt supported

user_agents.name: AI training crawlers
user_agents.purpose: Collection of data for AI model training
user_agents.scope: Content crawling for training datasets; subject to canonical redirects via Redirects for AI Training feature
user_agents.opt_out: Publishers can redirect verified crawlers to preferred pages; HTTP 402 Payment Required monetization option available
